'''Everen Ettene''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. While Ettene took [[Halagad Ventor]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], only Ventor returned from diplomacy talks in the [[Virgillian Civil War]].<ref name="HNN45" />

==Biography==
Everen Ettene began training in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during infancy as with all Jedi of the era. Studying at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Ettene eventually passed the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|knighted]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Serving as part of a delegation of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Ettene served beneath [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]] as the Jedi negotiated the [[Alderaan Ascendancy Contention]] between [[House of Organa/Legends|House Organa]] and [[House of Antilles|House Antilles]].<ref name="swcw">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref> Further pursuits of knowledge of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] skill earned her the rank of Master. Years after meeting [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], Ettene agreed to discuss with the newly appointed [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] the possibilities of taking on his dear friend, [[Halagad Ventor]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Having trained at the [[Almas Academy|experimental Jedi academy]] on [[Almas]] since the age of seventeen, Ventor had been refused an apprenticeship by every Master he approached. Where all other Masters refused based on age and an uncontrolled mind, Ettene was intrigued by the challenge presented by the teenager that reminded her of herself at that age and agreed to take him on as a Padawan.<ref name="DOE" /><ref name="swcw" />

[[File:Halagad_dramatis_persona.jpg|thumb|left|Halagad Ventor, apprentice of Everen Ettene]]
Under her tutelage, Ettene showed Ventor compassion while chastising him and castigating the young Jedi in order to tame his brash personality. Nurturing him as a mother would tend to her son, the pair formed a strong bond that enabled Ventor to grow in the Force.<ref name="swcw" /> In the wake of the failed [[Outbound Flight Project]], the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] dispatched Ettene and her apprentice to investigate the reasons behind the disaster and the two grilled Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in their involvement in the affair. Despite the unpleasantness of this original meeting, Ettene saw that Ventor and Skywalker became quick friends sometime after the investigation was concluded.<ref name="swcw" /> In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], the High Council assigned Ettene to mediate the ongoing [[Virgillian Civil War]] between the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] and the [[Aristocracy]]. Consisting of two Master-Padawan teams, the diplomatic envoy was made up of [[Ludwin Katarkus]] and [[Danyawarra]], and Master Ettene and Padawan Ventor. As the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] carrying the Jedi envoy arrived, it was attacked and destroyed. After receiving no word from the diplomatic team for three weeks, the team was declared lost on 13:2:28 GrS and it was announced that the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] would be holding [[Jedi funeral/Legends|memorial services]] for them the next day.<ref name="HNN45" />

Despite the official reports of their deaths, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] had not given up on his old friend, Ventor. In the days following the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] at [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Organa, his close friend [[Giles Durane]], and the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ashka Boda]] traveled to Virgillia in search of the Master-Padawan pair. While Ettene and Katarkus perished before being rescued, both Padawans Danywarra and Ventor made it off the planet alive, going on to serve as [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commanders]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="swcw" />

==Personality and traits==
Described as bull-headed by her colleague, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], Everen Ettene saw herself in the reckless and proud [[Halagad Ventor]]. After taking him on as a student, she loved him like a son and fought to wrangle his ego and personality and shape him into a strong Jedi.
